name: AWS Certificate Manager
description: Sends data to AWS Certificate Manager

fields.label: Certificate ARN
fields.description: String that contains the ARN of the ACM certificate to be renewed. This must be of the form: arn:aws:acm:region:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012.

fields.label: Certificate ARN
fields.description: String that contains the ARN of the ACM certificate to be renewed. This must be of the form: arn:aws:acm:region:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: certificateStatuses, extendedKeyUsage, keyTypes, keyUsage)

fields.label: Certificate ARN
fields.description: String that contains the ARN of the ACM certificate to be renewed. This must be of the form: arn:aws:acm:region:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012.

fields.label: Certificate ARN
fields.description: String that contains the ARN of the ACM certificate to be renewed. This must be of the form: arn:aws:acm:region:123456789012:certificate/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012.
